channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: AI Promised the Audemars Piguet x Swatch Wristwatch. China Will Deliver It
item.description: Watch fans spent a week falling in love with colorful Royal Oak wristwatches that didn’t exist—then the real thing arrived. Now, fantasy is becoming a manufacturing opportunity.

item.title: The Motorola Razr 2025 FIFA World Cup edition is a limited edition flip phone that's actually worth buying
item.description: A mid-range phone that consistently punches above its weight, the Razr 2025 is still arguably the best-value flip phone for most people, especially as the 2026 version is more expensive.

item.title: AT&T, T-Mobile, and Verizon team up to eliminate coverage dead zones
item.description: AT&T, T-Mobile, and Verizon have agreed to work together under a new joint venture that aims to end wireless dead zones in the US. The partnership was announced today as an "agreement in principle," but if finalized would see the three carrier companies pooling their ground-based spectrum resources together to increase coverage in rural areas. […]

item.title: Apple voudrait empêcher l’IA de faire n’importe quoi sur l’App Store
item.description: Apple développerait un système, composé de garde-fous, pour contrôler les applications d'IA agentique tierces dans l'App Store. Ce système viserait à protéger la sécurité des utilisateurs et à préserver le modèle économique d'Apple.

item.title: Demi Moore's AI comments at Cannes Film Festival have split the internet in two — but Hacks season 5 episode 6 had the perfect response even before she made them
item.description: Social media might be up in arms over Demi Moore's AI comments at Cannes Film Festival, but it's also found the perfect response in Hacks season 5 episode 6.

item.title: Asus dévoile une Nvidia RTX 5090 compacte, préparez-vous à casser la tirelire
item.description: Nouvelle version de la carte graphique Nvidia RTX 5090 chez Asus. Particularité : seulement deux ventilateurs pour gagner en compacité.

item.title: Windows Update will soon revert problematic drivers automatically
item.description: The company is also trying to prevent driver problems before they happen with a new initiative.

item.title: Don't miss this surprising discount on the 4.5-star Samsung 9100 Pro 1TB SSD at Amazon
item.description: Even with prices soaring due to the ongoing storage crisis, Amazon has just dropped this 4.5-star-rated Samsung 9100 Pro 1TB SSD to £165.

item.title: Europe wants to dodge troublesome regions by building undersea cables beneath the Arctic
item.description: The EU wants to avoid regions of instability by putting the internet under the Arctic.

item.title: Insta360’s new viewfinder turns the action cam into a retro shooter
item.description: The pill-shaped Insta360 Go 3S 4K action camera launched in June 2024 as an updated version of the 2.7K Go 3 that debuted a year prior. While last year’s Go Ultra introduced a redesign with a larger sensor and higher frame rates, the Go 3S has stuck around as a smaller but still very capable […]

item.title: I’m obsessed with Forza Horizon 6, and I’ve barely even raced
item.description: For the last week, I've spent every evening unwinding by speeding through the Japanese countryside, blaring Babymetal as I take in the sights. Forza Horizon 6 is ostensibly a racing game, one in which you play an up-and-coming driver intent on making a name for themselves. But, like the rest of the series, it's also […]

item.title: Forza Horizon 6 is magnificent, and one new feature cements it as my favorite in the series to date
item.description: Forza Horizon 6 is a huge improvement over the fifth entry, and a reminder of what makes Playground Games one of the best studios in Xbox’s repertoire.

item.title: Insta360 reveals one of the wackiest camera kits for 2026 — its thumb-sized 4K camera with no screen can now include a waist-level optical viewfinder and new Polaroid-like look
item.description: Insta360 has launched its popular thumb-sized 4K action camera in a 'Retro' kit, which ditches the action pod for an optical viewfinder dock and Polaroid-like aesthetic

item.title: Soccer superstar Messi is bigger than ever thanks Lowe’s 10-foot inflatable statue
item.description: It’s the Skelly of soccer. Dozens of brands are using the 2026 FIFA World Cup as a chance to cash in on themed ads, products, and brand collaborations. But the home goods giant Lowe’s is doing something unique: debuting a 10-foot-tall inflatable of Lionel Messi for fans to put in their front yards.

item.title: Test du Acer Swift 16 AI (2026) : le meilleur d’Intel et Acer en un produit
item.description: Il est temps pour Acer de suivre la tendance du moment et intégrer l'Intel Core Ultra 3 dans son Swift 16 AI pour l'année 2026.

item.title: Performances de Forza Horizon 6 sur PC : 8 cartes graphiques testées avec et sans ray tracing
item.description: Forza Horizon 6 investit les paysages ruraux et urbains du Japon pour un nouvel épisode qui déploie encore plus les ailes de son moteur, le ForzaTech. Nous avons testé le jeu sur 8 cartes graphiques, avec et sans ray tracing.

item.title: The day I stopped following the male idea of power
item.description: If I can win and you can win, why is that not better? “Who are your enemies?”

item.title: IKEA just launched a shapeshifting furniture range, and I spent far too long trying to figure out each item's hidden secret
item.description: From inflatable chairs, to rocking benches, to side tables that snap closed like a suitcase, there are plenty of Easter eggs to discover in the PS 2026 collection.

item.title: 'We are making clear, strategic investments': Cisco cuts 4,000 jobs, even as AI orders surge
item.description: Cisco CEO Chuck Robbins announces plans to lay off 4,000 workers as the company shifts its focus to high-growth areas.

item.title: Don't settle for supermarket solar lights: Govee's made smart strings that look great outdoors
item.description: Govee's first solar lighting product is a smart string light designed to be great outdoors

item.title: Barack Obama has some deep answers to Stephen Colberts quickfire questions
item.description: Former president Barack Obama sat down opposite Stephen Colbert to take the famous "Colbert Questionert".

item.title: Ncuti Gatwa regenerates for SNL UK in hosting teaser
item.description: "Doctor Who" star Ncuti Gatwa is set to host the final episode of "SNL UK" Season 1 on May 16 and the regeneration jokes are out.

item.title: PrivadoVPN is my $30 traveling companion for watching Beef, Grey's Anatomy, Yellowstone and everything that Netflix has to offer, wherever I go in the world – and there’s a sneaky hack to save on the price
item.description: There are more complete VPNs out there but none as cheap as this PrivadoVPN deal that will unblock Netflix every single time.

item.title: Un objet de la taille d’un immeuble file vers la Lune, et un expert sait déjà quand il va frapper
item.description: Depuis plus d’un an, il tourne silencieusement autour de la Terre sur une trajectoire devenue aussi fascinante qu’inquiétante. Et selon des calculs très sérieux, son voyage pourrait bientôt se terminer par une collision que des spécialistes et amateurs suivront de très près.

item.title: Le remake d’Assassin’s Creed Black Flag est en précommande à son meilleur prix pour faire souffler un vent de flibusterie sur PS5
item.description: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced est le remake du jeu de 2013, disponible le 9 juillet 2026 et déjà en précommande à 44,99 euros au lieu de 59,99 euros sur E.Leclerc et Auchan.

item.title: Don't let AI enthusiasm lock you into outdated infrastructure
item.description: Outdated buying habits are creating an AI infrastructure trap -flexibility now prevents costly lock-in later.

item.title: Canal+ accuse Disney d’avoir utilisé les données personnelles de ses clients
item.description: Canal+ accuse Disney d’avoir exploité les données personnelles de ses clients afin de faire la promotion de la plateforme de streaming Disney+. Le groupe français réclame 137 millions d'euros de dommages et intérêts au géant américain.

item.title: InstaFarm Automated Indoor Microgreens Garden Review: Easy Being Green
item.description: The InstaFarm makes growing your own microgreens practical at home.

item.title: Quantum Q-Day could disrupt the world even sooner than AGI
item.description: Quantum Q-Day threatens encryption; organizations must prepare now.

item.title: Gen Z Is Pioneering a New Understanding of Truth
item.description: The first generation to truly grow up online, Generation Z and their cohort live in a social media ecosystem that blends facts and feelings. It’s significantly shifting how they understand what’s true.

item.title: You can make an app for that
item.description: The tyranny of software is almost over. Since the first computer programmers wrote the first computer programs, we, the users of that software, have been forced to live in the worlds those programs create. The features are the features. The design is the design. Want something else, something better? Learn to code, I guess. Until […]

item.title: How to watch NRL Magic Round 2026: Rugby League Free Streams, TV Channels, Preview
item.description: 16 teams descend on Brisbane for the annual festival, here's how to watch NRL Magic Round 2026 live streams with TV channels and FREE options explained.

item.title: The Internet Archive at 30: Can the web’s memory bank withstand the AI era?
item.description: Three decades after Brewster Kahle founded the Internet Archive to preserve humanity’s digital record, the nonprofit behind the Wayback Machine is confronting AI scraping fears, antagonistic publishers, and rising storage costs that threaten the future of the open web. If you were to travel back in time to 1996 with a 2TB thumb drive, you’d be able to fit the entire World Wide Web on it....

item.title: Welcome to the age of the underdog AI model
item.description: A $20 million investment from Krea demonstrates that promising AI innovation can come from smaller companies betting big. Custom AI models are not just for the AI giants anymore. Because the 37-person startup Krea is releasing its first generative AI model as the design tools startup repositions itself as a full-fledged AI research lab.
